short_text: Zampa to Shoriful Islam, Caught by Finch!! and A googly outside off and Shoriful Islam swings hard at, only to get a thi
full_text: Zampa to Shoriful Islam, Caught by Finch!! and A googly outside off and Shoriful Islam swings hard at, only to get a thick outside edge to Finch at slip. Another disappointing performance by Bangladesh who have been bowled out for less than 100 for the second time in a row.

short_text: Zampa to Shoriful Islam, no run, on a length around off, Shoriful Islam knocks this back to the bowler
full_text: Zampa to Shoriful Islam, no run, on a length around off, Shoriful Islam knocks this back to the bowler

short_text: Zampa to Mustafizur, Caught by Smith!! Gives this some good amount of flight and the southpaw lofts it straight down the
full_text: Zampa to Mustafizur, Caught by Smith!! Gives this some good amount of flight and the southpaw lofts it straight down the throat of long-on. Smith takes a comfortable catch near the boundary and Zampa has two more deliveries to get a five-for. Can he?

short_text: Zampa to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, full and quick on leg, Taskin Ahmed gets an inside edge towards square leg as he tries to
full_text: Zampa to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, full and quick on leg, Taskin Ahmed gets an inside edge towards square leg as he tries to flick it away

full_text: Zampa to Taskin Ahmed, 2 runs, at the leg stump and the batter has glanced this to fine leg for a brace

short_text: Zampa to Taskin Ahmed, no run, Was the googly outside off and Taskin Ahmed got a nick as he goes for a drive. Wade puts
full_text: Zampa to Taskin Ahmed, no run, Was the googly outside off and Taskin Ahmed got a nick as he goes for a drive. Wade puts down a regulation take and Zampa looks disappointed as he has his hands on his head

short_text: Cummins to Mustafizur, 2 runs, pitched up by Cummins, a half-volley and the batter has chipped this over the infield at
full_text: Cummins to Mustafizur, 2 runs, pitched up by Cummins, a half-volley and the batter has chipped this over the infield at mid-off, they take a couple of runs more

short_text: Cummins to Mustafizur, no run, a well directed bouncer by Cummins from round the wicket, Mustafizur who was backing away
full_text: Cummins to Mustafizur, no run, a well directed bouncer by Cummins from round the wicket, Mustafizur who was backing away, fails to guide it over the keeper, beaten

short_text: Cummins to Mustafizur, 2 runs, slow and short on off, Mustafizur backs away and slaps this over cover, doesn't get the t
full_text: Cummins to Mustafizur, 2 runs, slow and short on off, Mustafizur backs away and slaps this over cover, doesn't get the timing right and they take a couple of runs

short_text: Cummins to Mustafizur, no run, short and quick on leg, Mustafizur backs away to play a cut, gets beaten due to the bounc
full_text: Cummins to Mustafizur, no run, short and quick on leg, Mustafizur backs away to play a cut, gets beaten due to the bounce

short_text: Cummins to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, this one dips in front of the batter and Taskin Ahmed just manages to flick it towards C
full_text: Cummins to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, this one dips in front of the batter and Taskin Ahmed just manages to flick it towards Cummins' left-side, and they take a quick run

short_text: Cummins to Taskin Ahmed, no run, on a length around off, Taskin Ahmed drives it on the rise to cover
full_text: Cummins to Taskin Ahmed, no run, on a length around off, Taskin Ahmed drives it on the rise to cover

full_text: Starc to Mustafizur, no run, in his quest to bowl another yorker, Starc ends up bowling a low full toss, Mustafizur pushes it towards cover

short_text: Starc to Mustafizur, no run, right into the blockhole around middle and leg, Mustafizur digs it out into the leg-side
full_text: Starc to Mustafizur, no run, right into the blockhole around middle and leg, Mustafizur digs it out into the leg-side

short_text: Starc to Mustafizur, no run, full and quick around middle and leg, Mustafizur backs away to play this, ends up getting a
full_text: Starc to Mustafizur, no run, full and quick around middle and leg, Mustafizur backs away to play this, ends up getting an inside edge past his stumps and towards short fine leg

short_text: Starc to Mustafizur, no run, yorker on off, and Mustafizur manages to squeeze it out
full_text: Starc to Mustafizur, no run, yorker on off, and Mustafizur manages to squeeze it out

short_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, Caught by Wade!! Strangled down the leg side! Starc was brought back by Finch and the pacer delive
full_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, Caught by Wade!! Strangled down the leg side! Starc was brought back by Finch and the pacer delivers. A short ball by him down the leg side and Mahmudullah gets a faint tickle as he tries to glance it away. Wade dives to his left and completes the formalities and Bangladesh are on the verge of getting bowled out cheaply once again. This is exactly what SA did to them!

short_text: Starc to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, fired down the leg-side, Taskin Ahmed glances it away to fine leg for one
full_text: Starc to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, fired down the leg-side, Taskin Ahmed glances it away to fine leg for one

full_text: Maxwell to Taskin Ahmed, 1 run, 92kph, on a length around middle and leg, Taskin Ahmed knocks it down to long-on for one

short_text: Maxwell to Taskin Ahmed, no run, on his front foot to push this loopy delivery to cover
full_text: Maxwell to Taskin Ahmed, no run, on his front foot to push this loopy delivery to cover

full_text: Maxwell to Taskin Ahmed, no run, quicker one by Maxwell, this ball skids along the deck and Taskin Ahmed blocks it

full_text: Maxwell to Taskin Ahmed, no run, a lot slower through the air, outside off and Taskin Ahmed opens his bat face to steer this to point

short_text: Maxwell to Taskin Ahmed, no run, nicely tossed up delivery on off, Taskin Ahmed drives it to cover
full_text: Maxwell to Taskin Ahmed, no run, nicely tossed up delivery on off, Taskin Ahmed drives it to cover

short_text: Maxwell to Mahmudullah, 1 run, on a length around middle and leg, Mahmudullah works this through mid-wicket for one
full_text: Maxwell to Mahmudullah, 1 run, on a length around middle and leg, Mahmudullah works this through mid-wicket for one

short_text: Zampa to Mahedi Hasan, Lbw!! That's the third wicket of the innings for Zampa and he still has an over to go! This ball
full_text: Zampa to Mahedi Hasan, Lbw!! That's the third wicket of the innings for Zampa and he still has an over to go! This ball doesn't spin at all and goes straight. And Mahedi Hasan rocks back in his crease to swipe it away, but gets beaten and struck on the pads. Impact in line and it's clipping leg, and that shall be a golden duck for Mahedi Hasan.

short_text: Zampa to Shamim Hossain, Caught by Wade!! Zampa strikes, breaks the partnership. Was a googly outside off and Shamim Hos
full_text: Zampa to Shamim Hossain, Caught by Wade!! Zampa strikes, breaks the partnership. Was a googly outside off and Shamim Hossain goes for a cut, only to get a healthy outside edge. Wade takes a sharp catch behind the wickets and Bangladesh are six down. Will Australia manage to retrict Bangladesh to a total lesser than what South Africa did? Or do we see a few big hits from their skipper?

short_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, 1 run, around off, on a yorker length and Mahmudullah flicks is towards mid-wicket off an inside e
full_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, 1 run, around off, on a yorker length and Mahmudullah flicks is towards mid-wicket off an inside edge

short_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, no run, really full ball on middle and off, almost a yorker, Mahmudullah brings his bat down in ti
full_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, no run, really full ball on middle and off, almost a yorker, Mahmudullah brings his bat down in time and jams this out into the off-side

short_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, 2 runs, a full toss on middle and leg, Mahmudullah goes down on his knee and scoops this towards f
full_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, 2 runs, a full toss on middle and leg, Mahmudullah goes down on his knee and scoops this towards fine leg for a couple of runs

short_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, , not a great call by the umpire I think, this was just inside the tramline. Mahmudullah was looki
full_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, , not a great call by the umpire I think, this was just inside the tramline. Mahmudullah was looking to play the paddle sweep, but Zampa kept it full and wide outside off, not allowing the batter to have a go at him

full_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, no run, slider by Zampa, Mahmudullah camps back and knocks it back to the bowler

full_text: Cummins to Mahmudullah, 1 run, short of length delivery on the stumps at I0$, tucked away to deep square's right

full_text: Cummins to Shamim Hossain, no run, full and just outside off, Shamim looks to push and gets a thick inside edge that rolls to the left of the bowler

full_text: Cummins to Shamim Hossain, no run, I0$ back of a length delivery on leg-stump, Shamim looks to flick and misses. Gets hit high on the pads...

short_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, no run, comes down the track and gets a thick inside edge onto pad as he tries to knock it down th
full_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, no run, comes down the track and gets a thick inside edge onto pad as he tries to knock it down the ground. A huge appeal from the keeper but no dice...

full_text: Zampa to Mahmudullah, no run, goes on the back foot and punches it to cover

full_text: Zampa to Shamim Hossain, 1 run, full on off, driven down to long-on

full_text: Zampa to Shamim Hossain, no run, tucked away towards mid-wicket

full_text: Zampa to Shamim Hossain, , he does this a lot in the domestic leagues and no wonder he likes to take on the leggies... Sits down on one knee, gets under the flighted delivery and slogsweeps it flat over deep mid-wicket's left

full_text: Zampa to Shamim Hossain, no run, flighted up just outside off, Shamim hangs back and taps into the off-side

short_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, 2 runs, full and wide of off, Mahmudullah leans across and drives it to the left of sweeper cover.
full_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, 2 runs, full and wide of off, Mahmudullah leans across and drives it to the left of sweeper cover. The throw from the fielder was wayward (too high for Wade at the striker's end) and they nab a single on the overthrow

full_text: Starc to Shamim Hossain, no run, slower and fuller on the stumps, Shamim looks to slog on the leg-side and mistimes off the toe-end towards mid-wicket

short_text: Starc to Shamim Hossain, , whoa! This lad has some guts. He sits down on one knee, meets the delivery on a fuller length
full_text: Starc to Shamim Hossain, , whoa! This lad has some guts. He sits down on one knee, meets the delivery on a fuller length and swipes Mitchell Starc over mid-on for a one-bounce boundary

full_text: Starc to Shamim Hossain, no run, full and slanting in towards off, Shamim drives it off the inside half towards mid-on

full_text: Starc to Shamim Hossain, , a mild appeal from the bowler but that missed everything, short and sliding down the leg-side as Shamim flicks and misses

full_text: Starc to Shamim Hossain, , full and sprayed miles down the leg-side, Shamim Hossain lets it go

full_text: Zampa to Shamim Hossain, no run, floated up just outside off, Shamim drives to the right of cover

short_text: Zampa to Afif Hossain, Caught by Finch!! Bangladesh are getting a taste of their own medicine. First ball from Zampa and
full_text: Zampa to Afif Hossain, Caught by Finch!! Bangladesh are getting a taste of their own medicine. First ball from Zampa and Afif gives catching practice to Finch at slip. Just a fizzy googly around off and Afif's feet went nowhere. Leant across and poked with hard hands before sending a healthy edge to the Australian skipper.

short_text: Hazlewood to Afif Hossain, leg byes, 1 run, I0$ length delivery on leg-stump, Afif misses the glance and it rolls off th
full_text: Hazlewood to Afif Hossain, leg byes, 1 run, I0$ length delivery on leg-stump, Afif misses the glance and it rolls off the thigh pad to the right of the keeper

full_text: Hazlewood to Afif Hossain, no run, I0$ short and wide outside off, Afif punches and can't beat the diving fielder at backward point

full_text: Hazlewood to Afif Hossain, no run, I0$ full delivery on the stumps, Afif drags it off the inside half towards mid-wicket

short_text: Hazlewood to Naim, Caught by Cummins!! Naim falls for the same trap. It was Rabada last game and Hazlewood now. Gets lur
full_text: Hazlewood to Naim, Caught by Cummins!! Naim falls for the same trap. It was Rabada last game and Hazlewood now. Gets lured by the short ball and drags the pull off the thick inside half to find the lurking fielder at mid-wicket. He was out in a similar fashion in the last game and Taskin Ahmed has a few words to say from the dressing room probably hinting that he should have resisted that temptation. Bangladesh 4 down in no-time, well...well...

short_text: Hazlewood to Naim, no run, good length delivery just outside off, Naim looks to work it into the leg-side and gets a thi
full_text: Hazlewood to Naim, no run, good length delivery just outside off, Naim looks to work it into the leg-side and gets a thick inside edge onto pad

short_text: Hazlewood to Naim, , Mohammad Naim is all class. Leans into a length delivery and drives with full face of the bat past
full_text: Hazlewood to Naim, , Mohammad Naim is all class. Leans into a length delivery and drives with full face of the bat past the non-striker, raced away...

short_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, , full and swinging away outside off, Mahmudullah pokes with hard hands and the outside edge flies
full_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, , full and swinging away outside off, Mahmudullah pokes with hard hands and the outside edge flies past the lone slip in a jiffy

short_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, , the one-legged pull. A touch of Aaron Finch's lazy elegance in that shot. Allows the short ball
full_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, , the one-legged pull. A touch of Aaron Finch's lazy elegance in that shot. Allows the short ball to jump up towards his chest and then times the pull in the gap between mid-on and mid-wicket. Went deep inside the crease and slotted it in the gap...

full_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, no run, back of a length outside off at I0$, Mahmudullah jumps inside the crease and taps to backward point

full_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, no run, full and shaping away outside off at I0$, Mahmudullah tries to drive sans any feet and gets beaten on the outside edge

full_text: Starc to Mahmudullah, no run, good length angling away outside off, Mahmudullah shuffles and shoulders arms

full_text: Starc to Naim, 1 run, a friendly I0$ full toss on the pads (yorker gone wrong perhaps) and Naim tries to hit it too hard, only managing to drag it off the inside half backwards of square leg

full_text: Cummins to Naim, 1 run, I0$ short of length wide of off, Naim opens the bat face and steers it square of third man

full_text: Cummins to Naim, no run, slower length delivery outside off, punched straight to backward point

short_text: Cummins to Naim, , timed! Lovely batting from Mohammad Naim. Watches the ball till the last minute, opens the bat face a
full_text: Cummins to Naim, , timed! Lovely batting from Mohammad Naim. Watches the ball till the last minute, opens the bat face and creams the length delivery in the gap between backward point and cover. Stayed side-on and timed it to perfection...

full_text: Cummins to Naim, no run, jumps back and punches the I0$ length delivery to backward point

full_text: Cummins to Naim, no run, I0$ angling away from a good length outside off, Naim looks to poke and gets beaten on the outside edge

full_text: Cummins to Naim, , width on offer and Naim goes chasing... slices the punch off the thick outside half and it flies past the diving Steve Smith to his left at backward point

full_text: Maxwell to Mahmudullah, no run, full on the stumps, driven back to the bowler

short_text: Maxwell to Mushfiqur, Lbw!! It's getting bad to worse for Bangladesh. Mushfiqur looked completely out of touch apart fro
full_text: Maxwell to Mushfiqur, Lbw!! It's getting bad to worse for Bangladesh. Mushfiqur looked completely out of touch apart from that one odd game against Sri Lanka and his selection will come under scanner when they decide to sit for a review. A nothing shot really. Not sure if he was watching the ball till the last minute and onto the bat, just tried to nudge it into the leg-side and missed a straight offbreak. Hit in line with middle and dead.

full_text: Maxwell to Naim, 1 run, dropped short on the stumps, Naim swivels and heaves the pull to deep mid-wicket

full_text: Maxwell to Mushfiqur, 1 run, full on the stumps, nudged away wide of mid-wicket

full_text: Maxwell to Mushfiqur, , full and fired down the leg-side, Mushfiqur lets it go

full_text: Maxwell to Naim, 1 run, fuller and flatter outside off, driven down to long-off

short_text: Hazlewood to Soumya Sarkar, Bowled!! When you play quality sides like Australia, you just need to tighten your basics an
full_text: Hazlewood to Soumya Sarkar, Bowled!! When you play quality sides like Australia, you just need to tighten your basics and feet movement is one of the premier things at that while batting. Soumya Sarkar was lazy, just waiting for the ball to curl in and then decided to poke at it in the corridor of uncertainty. Result: A thick inside edge and it ricochets quickly into middle and off.

short_text: Hazlewood to Soumya Sarkar, no run, I0$ short ball angled into the body, Soumya Sarkar swivels and mistimes the pull to
full_text: Hazlewood to Soumya Sarkar, no run, I0$ short ball angled into the body, Soumya Sarkar swivels and mistimes the pull to the left of Mitch Marsh at square leg

full_text: Hazlewood to Soumya Sarkar, no run, good length angled into middle and off at I0$, Soumya Sarkar sits back and steers it gently towards the lone slip

short_text: Hazlewood to Soumya Sarkar, , first boundary for Soumya Sarkar and Bangladesh! Swipes a I0$ length delivery from outside
full_text: Hazlewood to Soumya Sarkar, , first boundary for Soumya Sarkar and Bangladesh! Swipes a I0$ length delivery from outside off and slots it in the gap between mid-on and mid-wicket. Didn't time it too well but got the placement spot on...

full_text: Hazlewood to Soumya Sarkar, no run, good length on and around off at I0$, Soumya Sarkar leans forward and taps in front of cover

full_text: Hazlewood to Soumya Sarkar, no run, I0$ good length on and around off, Soumya Sarkar hops and dinks it into the leg-side

full_text: Starc to Naim, no run, I0$ short of length outside off, Naim opens the bat face and taps straight to backward point

full_text: Starc to Soumya Sarkar, 1 run, hops and dabs a I0$ back of a length delivery wide of backward point for a hesitant single. Hesitant because both were ball-watching and only decided to nab the single after spotting the ball dribble wide of the fielder

short_text: Starc to Liton Das, Bowled!! Dragged on. You wanna try and drive Mitch Starc in his first over on a surface that has som
full_text: Starc to Liton Das, Bowled!! Dragged on. You wanna try and drive Mitch Starc in his first over on a surface that has some movement, goodluck! Liton Das looks to push this I0$ full delivery from just outside off and a hint of late inward movement meant the inside edge flew back to smack the leg-stump. The Bangladesh opener doesn't trouble the scorers.

full_text: Starc to Naim, 1 run, I0$ swinging in late just outside off, Naim jams it into the surface and gets a thick inside edge that flies down to fine leg

full_text: Starc to Naim, no run, I0$ swinging in full towards middle and off, Naim brings his bat down in time and jams it into the off-side

full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Mitchell Marsh, , and a thumping hit for a thumping win! Australia have done this in a canter.That was short, Mitchell Marsh jumped on that and hammered the pull over deep mid

full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Mitchell Marsh, , too short, two more needed as this one has been wided. Banged in short and Mitchell Marsh let it go

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Mitchell Marsh, , stand and hammer! That was a length delivery outside off, Mitchell Marsh stands tall a
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Mitchell Marsh, , stand and hammer! That was a length delivery outside off, Mitchell Marsh stands tall and wallops that drive past the flying attempt from the man at mid-off

short_text: Shoriful Islam to Warner, Bowled!! And timber! Another one goes in search of a quick finish. That was a length delivery,
full_text: Shoriful Islam to Warner, Bowled!! And timber! Another one goes in search of a quick finish. That was a length delivery, Warner looks to slog across the line and misses to be clean bowled. Was a little early into the whack and ended up missing the line.

short_text: Shoriful Islam to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, stays upright and punches the ball away into the off-side to find the man at co
full_text: Shoriful Islam to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, stays upright and punches the ball away into the off-side to find the man at cover point. They get a single as the fielder dived to stop it

short_text: Shoriful Islam to Warner, 1 run, charges down and jams the ball down to mid-on for a single. Got too close to the pitch
full_text: Shoriful Islam to Warner, 1 run, charges down and jams the ball down to mid-on for a single. Got too close to the pitch of the ball

short_text: Shoriful Islam to Warner, , short, outside off, Warner drags the pull down to find short mid. The bowler fell down in hi
full_text: Shoriful Islam to Warner, , short, outside off, Warner drags the pull down to find short mid. The bowler fell down in his followthrough but not before he had overstepped. Free-hit coming up

short_text: Shoriful Islam to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, stabs the ball out with soft hands into the off-side for a single
full_text: Shoriful Islam to Mitchell Marsh, 1 run, stabs the ball out with soft hands into the off-side for a single

short_text: Shoriful Islam to Mitchell Marsh, , wow! He had good outings against Bangladesh before the WC and this shot off the firs
full_text: Shoriful Islam to Mitchell Marsh, , wow! He had good outings against Bangladesh before the WC and this shot off the first ball is an example. That was little short, Mitchell Marsh picks the length up so very quickly and pulls it well past deep mid for a four

short_text: Shoriful Islam to Warner, 1 run, gets a little cramped up and tucks the ball down to mid-on for a single
full_text: Shoriful Islam to Warner, 1 run, gets a little cramped up and tucks the ball down to mid-on for a single

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, Bowled!! Cleaned up! Taskin deserved that wicket. He kept running in and troubling Finch in the f
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, Bowled!! Cleaned up! Taskin deserved that wicket. He kept running in and troubling Finch in the first two overs, should have had him before but finally gets the last laugh. But Finch has done his job and he won't mind getting out in order to improve his team's NRR. Full and straight, Finch makes room to launch it over the off-side, misses and the ball crashes into the top of off-stump.

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, no run, backs away and Taskin follows him with a sharp in-angler, Finch is beaten for pace and th
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, no run, backs away and Taskin follows him with a sharp in-angler, Finch is beaten for pace and the ball deflects off the pad to Liton Das. The impact was outside leg and hence no appeal

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, , back to back sixes. He wants to get it done in the powerplay. Back of the hand slower ball and
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, , back to back sixes. He wants to get it done in the powerplay. Back of the hand slower ball and Finch spotted that, he waited and cross-batted it straight back over Taskin, just over the rope

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, , whoa! That's the best of the lot. In fact the best of the game. Full and outside off, Finch ope
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, , whoa! That's the best of the lot. In fact the best of the game. Full and outside off, Finch opens up his front hip and goes bang over extra cover, the pace of Taskin ensures that the ball goes all the way

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, no run, appeal for LBW from Taskin. Finch went for something fancy and does not connect. He bent
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, no run, appeal for LBW from Taskin. Finch went for something fancy and does not connect. He bent down to play the reverse scoop, missed and is struck on the back pad. The impact was outside off

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, 2 runs, in the air and lands safely. Finch goes deep in the crease and swings through the line, b
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, 2 runs, in the air and lands safely. Finch goes deep in the crease and swings through the line, ball hits him high on the bat and goes straight up, luckily for him the ball evades a backtracking Rahim from mid-on

short_text: Mustafizur to Warner, , much more in control of this. Short and outside off, Warner uses the pace on offer, opens the ba
full_text: Mustafizur to Warner, , much more in control of this. Short and outside off, Warner uses the pace on offer, opens the bat face and ramps it over the short third man region. from the over and Australia need only 30 more

short_text: Mustafizur to Warner, , streaky! Back of a length and around off, Warner makes a bit of room and slashes with hard hands
full_text: Mustafizur to Warner, , streaky! Back of a length and around off, Warner makes a bit of room and slashes with hard hands, the outside edge flies over the leaping short third man and races to the fence

short_text: Mustafizur to Finch, 1 run, missed out there. Full toss just below the waist, Finch is surprised and miscues the heave t
full_text: Mustafizur to Finch, 1 run, missed out there. Full toss just below the waist, Finch is surprised and miscues the heave to deep square leg

short_text: Mustafizur to Finch, , he's peppering that leg-side boundary. Most of his runs have come from deep square leg to deep mi
full_text: Mustafizur to Finch, , he's peppering that leg-side boundary. Most of his runs have come from deep square leg to deep mid-wicket. Fizz drifts onto the pads and Finch is waiting for that, he whips it with a strong bottom hand and sends it into the crowd. He wants to get it over with..

short_text: Mustafizur to Finch, , sprays the slower ball down leg, Finch tries to launch it into the leg-side but fails to connect
full_text: Mustafizur to Finch, , sprays the slower ball down leg, Finch tries to launch it into the leg-side but fails to connect

short_text: Mustafizur to Warner, 1 run, back of a length close to off, Warner knocks it wide of cover and crosses over
full_text: Mustafizur to Warner, 1 run, back of a length close to off, Warner knocks it wide of cover and crosses over

short_text: Mustafizur to Warner, , shot! That's Warner at his best. He did not try to overhit the ball. Just used the pace of Fizz
full_text: Mustafizur to Warner, , shot! That's Warner at his best. He did not try to overhit the ball. Just used the pace of Fizz and collected the boundary. Short of length around off, Warner stays leg-side, opens the bat face and crunches it square through point

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, , in the air and over the fielder. Taskin is not happy and has a go at Sarkar. Angled into the pa
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, , in the air and over the fielder. Taskin is not happy and has a go at Sarkar. Angled into the pads, Finch flicks it too well and there was a fielder at deep mid-wicket, but Sarkar was well inside the boundary rope and that's what agitated Taskin as he wanted him on the rope. The ball evades his leap and lands once before going past the rope

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, 1 run, slower short of length delivery, Warner nurdles it backward of square leg
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, 1 run, slower short of length delivery, Warner nurdles it backward of square leg

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, no run, 146kph delivery angled across the left hander, Warner drives sans footwork and is beaten
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, no run, 146kph delivery angled across the left hander, Warner drives sans footwork and is beaten on the outside edge. That was quick and Warner was also a tad late on the shot

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, 1 run, on a length and around off, Finch mistimes the heave to mid-on and Rahim is sitting on the
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, 1 run, on a length and around off, Finch mistimes the heave to mid-on and Rahim is sitting on the edge of the circle, easy single

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, no run, uhh! How did that miss the stumps? 146kph delivery angling in, Finch backs away and swing
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, no run, uhh! How did that miss the stumps? 146kph delivery angling in, Finch backs away and swings across the line, the ball beats the inside edge and flies over leg-stump. That wasn't far away..

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, 1 run, now Warner has a go and squirts an inside edge to short fine, Finch races across
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, 1 run, now Warner has a go and squirts an inside edge to short fine, Finch races across

short_text: Mustafizur to Finch, no run, ouch! That would sting. Another slower ball, this time around off, Finch clears his front l
full_text: Mustafizur to Finch, no run, ouch! That would sting. Another slower ball, this time around off, Finch clears his front leg and drills it straight back at the bowler, Fizz has no time to get out of the way and uses his hands to keep the ball from hitting his body. Finch had his hand up to apologise

short_text: Mustafizur to Finch, , that's more like it. Finch stays deep in the crease, spots the slower ball and just delays the ba
full_text: Mustafizur to Finch, , that's more like it. Finch stays deep in the crease, spots the slower ball and just delays the bat swing, clean connection as the ball sails away into the deep mid-wicket stand

short_text: Mustafizur to Warner, leg byes, 1 run, drifting into the pads, Warner misses the flick and the ball rolls off the pad
full_text: Mustafizur to Warner, leg byes, 1 run, drifting into the pads, Warner misses the flick and the ball rolls off the pad

short_text: Mustafizur to Finch, 1 run, once more the weight does not transfer forward as he mistimes the drive square of the wicket
full_text: Mustafizur to Finch, 1 run, once more the weight does not transfer forward as he mistimes the drive square of the wicket, just a single

short_text: Mustafizur to Finch, no run, slower delivery angled across, Finch swings for the cow corner stands and misses it by a mi
full_text: Mustafizur to Finch, no run, slower delivery angled across, Finch swings for the cow corner stands and misses it by a mile. Not sure if he's watching the ball all the way and is weight is on the back foot

short_text: Mustafizur to Finch, , geez! How fast is this outfield? This was a mistimed shot but the fielder had no chance of chasin
full_text: Mustafizur to Finch, , geez! How fast is this outfield? This was a mistimed shot but the fielder had no chance of chasing that down. Fizz goes full and outside off, Finch reaches for the drive and toe-ends it through extra cover. The mid-off fielder gives chase but he had no chance

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, 1 run, proper slog from Finch. Back of a length delivery, Finch does not bother to move his feet
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, 1 run, proper slog from Finch. Back of a length delivery, Finch does not bother to move his feet or get in-line, just swings across the line and drags it off the inner half through mid-wicket

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, 2 runs, sloppy. Taskin with a peach. He opens up Finch with a short of length delivery that strai
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, 2 runs, sloppy. Taskin with a peach. He opens up Finch with a short of length delivery that straightens, the Australian skipper was closing the bat face to tuck it into the leg-side and the leading edge rolls to third man, the throw is not gathered by Liton Das and the pair steal the extra run

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, no run, and again.. Touch fuller but there was width outside off, Finch goes hard without account
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, no run, and again.. Touch fuller but there was width outside off, Finch goes hard without accounting for the outswing, beaten on the outside edge

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, no run, width on offer and Finch's eyes lit up, he does not move his feet and just swings through
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Finch, no run, width on offer and Finch's eyes lit up, he does not move his feet and just swings through the line. Hint of away movement ensures that the ball goes past the outside edge

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, 1 run, strays onto the hips and Warner tucks it to deep square leg
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, 1 run, strays onto the hips and Warner tucks it to deep square leg

short_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, no run, 142kph back of a length delivery around off, Warner is solidly behind the line as he def
full_text: Taskin Ahmed to Warner, no run, 142kph back of a length delivery around off, Warner is solidly behind the line as he defends to cover-point
